description: Completed intensive training in programming fundamentals, problem-solving, and software development practices.
Worked on hands-on programming assignments covering algorithms, data structures, and object-oriented programming concepts.
Strengthened software engineering skills through practical implementation and project-based learning.
Explored machine learning workflows including data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation.
Implemented and analyzed machine learning models using Python and popular data science libraries.
Gained practical experience in applying ML techniques to real-world datasets and problem statements.
Developed an autonomous self-balancing robot using ROS, control theory, and sensor feedback systems.
Implemented navigation and task-execution logic in C++ and tested robot behavior through simulation environments.
Collaborated in a competitive robotics team to design, integrate, and optimize software components for real-time performance.
